name: GIGABYTE B850M EAGLE WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 3.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: GIGABYTE B850M EAGLE WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: Compact AM5 Micro-ATX motherboard with DDR5 and PCIe 5.0 support, featuring Wi-Fi 6E for solid connectivity.
